use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and dashboards
Toggle checklist items with visual feedback
Secondary action buttons in UI compositions
ai_summary: A flexible button component built with Radix UI's Slot for composition and Tailwind CSS with CVA styling. Features multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Supports disabled states, focus rings, and asChild prop for composition. Designed as an atomic, reusable input component for triggering actions across any industry application.
